ques: Locate the cheapest round-trip flights from New York to Tokyo leaving on April 25, 2026, and returning on May 15, 2026.
answer: Cannot retrieve prices — April 25, 2026 (departure) and May 15, 2026 (return) are in the past relative to the browser's current date (~June 2026). Google Flights only allows dates from the current month onward (earliest selectable is June 25, 2026), so no round-trip NYC→Tokyo flights for those past dates can be located.
